sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The state is now "NOT_FINISHED" again! Clicking on the sky blue square at (1, 1) seems to have restarted the level or at least cleared the game_over state. The board didn't change though (board_changed: false).
Let me check the current state to see if the magenta squares are back.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check if the level restarted
curr_seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
print(f"Step: {current_frame.step}")
print(f"Level: {current_frame.level}")

# Check for magenta squares
magenta = [n for n in curr_seg if n['color'] == 'M']
print(f"\nMagenta nodes: {len(magenta)}")
for n in magenta:
    print(f"  pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check for sky blue nodes
sky_blue = [n for n in curr_seg if n['color'] == 'S']
print(f"Sky blue nodes: {len(sky_blue)}")
for n in sky_blue:
    print(f"  pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check for blue nodes
blue = [n for n in curr_seg if n['color'] == 'b']
print(f"Blue nodes: {len(blue)}")
for n in blue:
    print(f"  pixels={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
